themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "And thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy mother's sister, nor of thy father's sister:...". Word-study detail reinforces "לָשֶׁ֥בֶת: you to dwell - properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet);...".
